title: Automations using the due date and the predecessor task status to release dependant tasks

posts.author: JBotha_2003 (Jonel Botha)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m setting up my company’s monday.com boards and one of the things I’ve noticed is that we cannot create custom automations that will release dependant tasks based on the due date of the task AND the status of the predecessor task.

This is a necessary automation for us, because some of our tasks are done on different dates and we have automations in place that send out notifications when the task is released, but without this automation we don’t receive the notifications on the correct date.

I don’t know if there is a different automation that I can use to achieve the same end result, but I’m all for learning new things. If there isn’t another way, is this something the product team might be willing to look into?
